items.title: Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.dek: The US plan has sparked public anger and led to demonstrations near the site of the proposed treatment facility.
items.body: The US plan has sparked public anger and led to demonstrations near the site of the proposed treatment facility.

items.title: Sabrina Carpenter gets restraining order against man who showed up at her home
items.dek: The singer reported a series of "deeply alarming" incidents at her house to Los Angeles police.
items.body: The singer reported a series of "deeply alarming" incidents at her house to Los Angeles police.
